title: The Terminal 101 ⌨️
description: Moving through folders and listing files.

slides.title: The Command Line ⌨️
slides.content:
### Ditch the Mouse

A pro hacker rarely uses a mouse. They use the **Terminal** (or Command Line Interface - CLI).

It's faster, more powerful, and allows for automation. Let's learn the basic navigation commands.

slides.title: Where am I? 📍
slides.content: To see which folder you are currently in, use `pwd` (Print Working Directory):

slides.title: What's here? 📂
slides.content: To see the files in your current folder, use `ls` (List):

slides.title: Changing Folders 🚶
slides.content:
To move into a folder, use `cd` (Change Directory):

To move back one level, use `cd ..`

quizData.question: Which command would you use to see what files are in your current folder?
quizData.explanation: 'ls' stands for list. It shows all the files and folders in your current directory.
